intro.tutorialStep3Body: Tracker Player dëggal na xew-xew mi ak mbirum xibaar yu am solo yu ñu mel ni:
intro.tutorialStep5Body: Sos naan laaj ci ab jàng ak jàppale xalaat yi ngir ubbi ay xereñ yu bees:
intro.introWelcome: Sa gàllu gi nga xam-xam ci wàllu xelal ci 68+ ay format — ci diggante MOD ak XM yu mag ci MPTM ak UMX yu bees — ci mbirum mbootaay bu mag ci
intro.tutorialLead: Bii ji bii ji gii naa nga ci ay xalaat yi ci Tracker Player, ci gis sa mbirum njëkk ba ci defaral player bi ngir sa jëfandikukat.
intro.tutorialStep4Body: Tracker Player man ngi jàppale ci seen bopp. Jàppale ci jëfandikukat bi ci diggante géwal bi (bar ci kaw) walla ci diggante Settings (bar ci ndoorteel):
intro.tutorialStep6Tip: Njaw wi: Ci mobile, yokk Tracker Player ci biir sa xët bu njëkk ngir am ay xibaar yu mel ni app bu am solo. Dafay liggéey bu baax ni Web App bu am solo ak caching bu amul internet.
intro.tutorialStep1Body: Listu muusik la wàllu bi ñu koy jëfandikoo ci Tracker Player. Jëfandikoo barë bi ci kaw gi ngir gis xaaj yi ci turu dencukaay walla tur. Ci suufu barë bi, mën nga gis ay filtre yu am solo:
intro.introWhatBody2Tail: , jukki Amiga MOD/XM tracker bu JavaScript la Steffest bind ko, mu ngi jàppale ci anam gu am solo ci tracker playback. Ci ndongo bi, proget bi daldi bokk Chiptune3 (WebAssembly engine bu bes bu libopenmpt) ak FFmpeg server-side transcoding, mu yokk format support bi ci MOD/XM ba ci 68 format yu bari.
intro.tutorialStep2Body: Duggal ci yoon wi ci listu mbind mi ngir tàmbalee ci wàllu. Jàppaleekat bi dafay yàggul — li ëpp ci mbind mi tàmbalee ci diggante benn simili. Ci jamono ji mbind mi di wàllu, dangay gis:
intro.introWelcomeNote: Tracker Player duppu la ci jàpp — mooy jàpp bu am solo ci platformu musiqa tracker, ak interface bu rafet, bu yëngu, visualization bu am solo ci jamono, oscilloscope bu nekk ci kanal, ak tool yi ñu def ngir defar aji gëm ak jëm ci musiqa tracker ci anam gu yomb ci appareil bu nekk.
intro.introWhatBody1: Tracker Player ab ay jëmm li ñu koy jëfandikoo ngir indi wuuteefu xalaat yi ci tracker music ci browser bi nekk tey. Du jëmm bu bees bu xam-xam, waaye mooy jëmm ju am solo ci jëfandikoo ak jëmm yu bees yu am solo yu ñu koy jëfandikoo, di defar ay jëmm yu am solo yu am solo.
intro.introTrackerBody3: Ba taay bi, woyu tracker mungi ci nawu ci jamono yi ci biir demoscene àdduna bi ak ci mbootaayu xibaarukaay yu yàgg yi. Tracker Player bëgg na gën a xoolal nit ñi ci xibaarukaay bii bu mel ne, bu am solo ci woyu nosukaay, ci anam gu bees ak mbëggëel bu yomb.
intro.introWhatBody3: Nga ciñu gëstu ak tànn ci listu woy, xoolal mbégte, système compte utilisateur ba noppi ci mbindin yu àdduna, Tracker Player def na ab système yu yomb ci mbégte yi nekk ci biir player bi, ngir joxe ñi jëfandikoo xam-xamu tracker music ak xalaat yu baax, ak amul xam-xam ci teknoloji.
intro.creditsNuxtDesc: Vue.js meta-framework bi gi yoroolu ci seenu frontend ak backend. Nuxt di nañu joxe server-side rendering ngir yàggale xalaat ak SEO, Nitro server ngir API yoon, SQLite database ci biir, ak code-splitting ci boppam ngir jëm ci jëm.
intro.introTrackerBody1: Màggal mu tracker (moo xamul ni màggal mu module walla màggal mu MOD) benn màggal digitaal bu am mbirum ci jamono ji mujj na tekk ci atum 1980 ci Commodore Amiga. Lu dul MP3 walla màggal mu yàgg, tracker files dañuy am ci biir gi xalaat yu màggal (notes, patterns, effets) ak échantillons yu instrument — ni benn fichier projet màggal bu am solo. Loolu tax na tracker files di am solo bu baax te am solo ci wàllu màggal bu am solo.
intro.creditsIntro: Tracker Player dañu ci mbërmiñu bu ubbeeku bu mag. Biir mbooloomi mbërmiñu 135,400+ gi ñu am di jële ko ci The Mod Archive — li ëpp ci internet ci mbërmiñu tracker. Nu nangu lool ci kenn ku jëfandikoo ak jëfandikoo bu ko defaral.
intro.creditsEmscriptenDesc: Mbindale gu ñu LLVM ci jëmmal kode yu C/C++ ci WebAssembly. Dafay jëfandikoo Emscripten ngir mbindal libopenmpt bi nu defal — ak waveform_processor bi nu def — ci benn modul WASM bu benn dencukaay bu mën a liggéey ci gaawu gi mel ne ci kàttan gi ci AudioWorklet bu browser bi.
intro.tutorialStep6Body: Benn xéet yi ci Tracker Player am nañu URL bu amul ànd ak ànd, bu mën a gàtt. Bindal liñku bi ci bar adres bu jëmukaay bi ngay jëfandikoo, su fekkee benn xéet di ci wàll — mu ngi doon mel ni /song/123456/filename.mod. Yónnee ko ci xarit yi, wone ko ci social media, walla bindal ko ngay jëfandikoo ci kaw. Liñku bi dina lëkkaloo ci xéet bi mel ne.
intro.creditsVueDesc: Vue, ci framework JavaScript bu bañu jëfandikoo ngir jàngal ci biir komponaŋ yi. API bu Composition bu Vue, système bu réactivité, ak komponaŋ yi ci benn dencukaay, ñoo tax mu man a def ak a wàlluwaat benn interface yu player bu rëy, ak kodu bu set, bu am ay modul.
intro.creditsWebGLDesc: API grafike bu-browser mi njiitu ci web lañu koy jëfandikoo ngir mbooleem mbindum tracker bi ci jamono ji. Dàttaliku mbindum note bi dafay dem ci kanvaas bu WebGL ci 60 fps, di gëna wone melokaanu note yi di daw ci melokaanu tracker yu njëkk yu mel ni ProTracker ak FastTracker II.
intro.creditsBassoonDesc: Sos naan la Steffest. Ab bindëm bu nekk ci jëmmalekat bi, ci wàllu internet, di ci wàllu Amiga MOD ak XM trackers — ProTracker ak FastTracker II — jëm ci JavaScript. BassoonTracker di joxe woyofu gi gëna am solo, gi tàmbalee ci biir projet bi, ak ndimbël bu full ci MOD yu 4 canaux ak XM yu canaux bu bare, ci envelopes, filters, ak effets.
intro.creditsTailwindDesc: Framework CSS bu njëkk ci jëfandikoo ngir ajuwu. Sistemi bii ci mbirum meloomin Tailwind di nañu defar ci seeni 16-tinge — kenn melo, ndëgëm, ak diggante di nañu wéy ci melo miy liggéey ci jëfandikoo ci ay mbirum CSS yu ñu génne ci seeni konfiguraasong Tailwind.
intro.creditsModArchiveDesc: Mbindal bu internet bu njëkk ci mbindin muñuñu wuñuñu, mooy jëmm ci 150,000 modul yu ñu jële ci ay artist yu ñuy jëm ci ñaari fukki at. Mod Archive mooy gëstu bu sax bu ñu am ci mbindin mi ci këruñu ak mbindin mi amul benn ci këruñu ci mbindin mi.
intro.creditsAudioWorkletDesc: Specifikasi API W3C Web Audio API mu ngi liggéyoo jàppaleekat bu amul néew laaj, ak amul xayma ci jubluwaay bu amul néew laaj ci benn xët bu amul néew laaj bu amul néew laaj. AudioWorklet mooy fi motoor bi Chiptune3 di liggéey ci libopenmpt WASM bu ñu def, bu amul ay jéggin ci xët bu mag bi, di indi wàlluwaay bu baax bu amul ay jéggin.
intro.introTrackerBody2: Format bii ngi tànnkó Karsten Obarski ci Ultimate Soundtracker ci atum 1987, tey jàppale ko ci demoscene — benn xaaj bu mag ci mbootaay gu xóot ci xalaat, fi programeeri, woykat ak xam-xamkat di wërsëg di def ay jumtukaay yu rafet. Ci lu ëpp fukki at, ay format yu bari yu tracker ñëw, kenn ci ñoom di gën a yokk li mën: ay channel yu bari, ay effet yu gën a baax, ay instrument yu synthesizer, mbind VST, ak mën a mélange. Tey, mbootaay gi tracker di ci àddina bi dina am solo, ak woy yu bees di génn bés bu nekk ci web buñ koy wax The Mod Archive.
intro.creditsChiptune3Desc: Sos naalef ci DrSnuggles — ab bibliothèque open-source JavaScript bu defaral libopenmpt ci benn AudioWorklet ngir wuutub ci browser 68+ format tracker. Ci saanu projet bii, nu defaral processor AudioWorklet bi ngir gis data waveform ci yenn kanal (tey jox dundu oscilloscope yu bari), nu yokk automatic gain control, tey defaral race-condition handling ngir wuutub track gu xaw. Chiptune3 mooy diggante Web Audio API bi ci browser ak dooleu dékkuwaay bi nu defaral ci libopenmpt, tey mooy engine bu nu nangu ne mooy bu baax.
intro.creditsLibopenmptDesc: Jëfandikoo ci OpenMPT ci ñi ko def. Biir gën a am solo ci tracker open-source, di gëna xam 68+ format module ak gëna am lu dul wuute. Nu soppi kode C bu libopenmpt — di yokk waveform_processor bu bees bu jàppale xibaar PCM ci kanal bu nekk ci mixer ba ci penku — te nu ko defar ci WebAssembly ci Emscripten. Nu defar WASM bu bees bi, di jàppale ci biir Chiptune3, di jox oscilloscope ci kanal bu nekk, di defar kode bu dékkuwaay bu gëna am solo ci 68+ format yi.

tutorialStep1Filters: Filtaaral Format — Diggël ngir ubbi liyoo xëcc ci mbind yu bari yu am solo. Jëfandikoo buton yi ñu wone ngir dogaloo ak mbind yi: Bassoon (MOD/XM), Major Tracker (MOD/XM/IT/S3M/MPTM), Chiptune3 Lëpp (56 format), walla Lëpp Suñu Mëna Jëfandikoo.
Séyóóluwa Kanaal — Wàluwa ci limu kanaal: 4 kanaal (MOD jamono ji), 8 kanaal, walla 8+ kanaal (modern multitrack).
Sise Sise — Sise ci méng: tuuti (<100KB), diggante, walla mag (>1MB).
Sëyñu Turu Tracker — Bindal turu tracker (misal, "Impulse Tracker", "FastTracker") ngir gis musiqa bu sos ak jëmmal software.
Xeet yi Tànk — Tànn liinu mbind mi ci ID, titu, turu dencukaay, mag, walla bésu soppi, ci anam gu yàgg walla gu wàcce.
Seletor bu Gise — Soppi ci diggante Tracks yépp, Favorites yi, ak Histoire bi nga jàng.
tutorialStep2Details: Xibaar yi ci jukki bi — Titu, artist, format, limu xalaay, ak limu jukki biñu wone ci kaw jëfandikoomi jukki bi.
Wër/Neexal & Jëfandikoo — Bët-bët bu mag bu wër/neexal ak jël-lu mel ne: Moomi (ci mbëj), Ci Rànkees (ci ron), Dëppoo benn, walla Taxaw ba noppi.
Bëy mbind — Bëy ci mbind bi ci kanam, walla bañal sa mbooleem wàllu ci jàppale ko.
Wolóomu ak Yónn — Tànnale wolóomu ak jëfandikoo bu jëm ci diggante, gëstu ci woy wi, di gis jamono ji jàpp ak jamono ji ñu topp.
Bataar la Làkku Xol — Dogal ci xol bi ngir yokk benn woy ci li nga bëgg (soxla akkaañ).
Dali — Denc laf yuwaanu tracker bi ci sa jëmm.
Liyen ModArchive — Ubi li bèl paj webu ci The ModArchive ngir gëna xam xalaat ak ay tontu ci mbootaay.
Mbindane xibaar yi — Gis xibaar yu détail: turu tracker, bés, jamono, tipe container, woy yu ndaw, limu kanal, instrument, échantillon, ordre, modèle, ak xibaar bu nekk bu bindkat bi jox.
tutorialStep3Details: Xoolal mbind — Gisal jàpp li ci tracker bi di wéy ci jamono ji, defar ci WebGL ngir am ay jëfandikukat yu rafet. Bët bu nekk di nañu ay channel, ron bu nekk di nañu ay note. Notes, instruments, volume, ak ay command d'effet lépp di nañu wone — ni ci tracker classique. Ngànalal toggle bi ngir soppi ci diggante vertical (traditionnel) ak horizontal (écran lâr).

Oscilloscopes pa Kanal — Ci gàmm ji jàpp, danga xool ab gridu melo yu mel ni xayma — benn ci benn kanal bu xët ci woy wi. Yiy liggéey ci processor bi nu def ci C-level waveform ci libopenmpt, bi jàppale xayma bu nekk bu kanal bu xët ba ci jamono ju njëkk ju xët wi. Xool xayma bu nekk bu kanal bu xët bi di dem ci jamono ju bon, di la jox ab xibaar bu xool ci ni woy wi def — kick drum ci kanal 1, bass ci kanal 2, lead ci kanal 3, ak yeneen.
Mbindilal yi jàpp li ñu gis mën nañu këyit/këyitul ci Settings ngir liggéey walla mbirum mbëggeel.
tutorialStep4Settings: Engine Jàngale — Tànn ci diggante BassoonTracker (MOD/XM yu dox), Chiptune3 (ñu ngi ko wax, 20+ formats), walla FFmpeg (format yu bari ci anam gu yombal ci anam gu server).

Tema — Wàllu ci 16 téemàŋ yu melo. Téemàŋ yu xereñ ñooy: Xereñ, Retro (Solarized), Ocean (Teal), Forest (Green), Strawberry (Pink), Blue, Pink, Cyan, Orange, ak Gray. Téemàŋ yu lëndë ñooy: Lëndë, Midnight (Deep Purple), Golden (Black & Gold), Purple, Red, ak Green.
Làkk — 52 làkk yu interface. Ménn mu lañu wàcce ci biir.
Wolóomu — Tàkk li mu am ci wolóomu bu am mbir mi ak mën a joxe ko ci yépp ci yoon wi.

tutorialStep5Details: Favorites — Xeetal ci xol bi ngir aji ko ci limu xeetal, mu am solo ci liy jële ci limu xeetal.
Taariix Ciyaarta — Hees kasta oo aad ciyaarto si toos ah ayaa loo duubayaa. Baadh taariikhdaada si aad uga hesho heesaha.
Sincronisaas yu diggante — Saanga yu mbind ak sa melokaan daan naan la koñ yu ci jëmkanam yu bari, su fekkee nga dugg ci.
Sutura — Sàq ci jàmm bi, mbooleem àdduna bi ñu bëgg ak li ñu def rekk la ñu jëfandikoo. Dara ci xibaar yi ñu amul, duñu ko jël walla jox.

items: Integrated libopenmpt as a third playback engine, supporting 68+ tracker formats with bit-accurate playback.
Developed custom waveform_processor in C — modifications to libopenmpt's source code enabling per-channel audio extraction before final mixing.
Compiled libopenmpt + waveform_processor to WebAssembly via Emscripten for in-browser execution.
Built WebGL-based pattern view with both vertical (traditional tracker) and horizontal (widescreen) display modes.
Added per-channel oscilloscope visualization — live scrolling waveforms for each audio channel, powered by the custom waveform processor.
Created adaptive font sizing and pixel-perfect text rendering in WebGL visualizer.
Implemented hard clipping protection to prevent uint8 texture overflow in waveform visualizers.
Added multi-channel signal normalization and noise gating for cleaner oscilloscope displays.
Fixed timing drift in Chiptune3 AudioWorklet for rock-solid playback synchronization.
Expanded format support to 56 formats in Chiptune3 + additional formats in libopenmpt.
Added user account system with registration, login, and favorites/history sync.
Added track info modal with comprehensive metadata display.
Added download modal — download original tracker files or convert to MP3.
Added horizontal layout mode for pattern display (transposed channel and row data).
Added theme-specific row highlight alpha variables for WebGL shader backgrounds.
Developed Chiptune3 — a custom WebAssembly audio engine supporting 20+ tracker formats with per-channel output.
Implemented AudioWorklet-based playback for low-latency, glitch-free audio.
Built dual-canvas oscilloscope system — spectrum analyzer (frequency domain) and waveform display (time domain).
Added WebGL rendering pipeline for high-performance visualizations.
Introduced 16 color themes with CSS custom properties and runtime switching.
Built the ear-bar sidebar (InfoDrawer) with 5 panels: Guide, Settings, Theme, Language, Account.
Added 52-language internationalization system with locale detection and fallback chains.
Implemented responsive mobile layout with safe-area support and collapsible navigation.
Added playlist search, format filter panel with preset buttons, and multi-field sort.
Built pagination controls with first/prev/-10/+10/next/last navigation.
Initial release as 'MOD Player' — a web-based player for MOD and XM tracker music.
Integrated BassoonTracker by Steffest as the core playback engine — browser-based Amiga tracker in JavaScript.
Built playlist interface with table view showing track number, title, and filename.
Added basic playback controls: play, pause, next, playback mode selection.
Created Settings panel with volume control, max loop setting, and display toggles.
Implemented local storage for user preferences (theme, language, settings).
Added introductory guide section explaining what tracker music is and how to use the player.
Sourced initial music library from CoolModFiles.com and The Mod Archive.
Designed the responsive layout foundation: header, player column, playlist column, footer.
Added dark and light theme support with CSS custom properties.

introFeatures: Mbindimbali xam 135,400+ fayil yu mbind yu tracker yu gëna 68+ format, ci diggante MOD yu 4-channel ba epics yu 256-channel.
Arkitektiir bu ñaari moteer: BassoonTracker (JS bu kàllk), Chiptune3 (AudioWorklet + libopenmpt WASM), ak FFmpeg (transcodage ci wàllu serveer) — ñu tànn ci sa boppam ngir benn dencukaay bu ne.
Nataal gi ci anam gi gis-gis tracker ci WebGL — gis naka ñi ñëw di dem ci anam gi mel ni ci jàngale tracker bu kàddu.
Osciloskopo yu mbindum yu kanal bu nekk — gis sañ-sañu jëfandikukat bu nekk ci jàll bi, di gis mbindum xët wi ci anam gu dund, di wéy ci limu C bu jëm ci mbindum xët.
Mbindeelu bu ñu def ngir mu mel neex ci anam gu am solo ci seeni mbir: ordinateur bu mag, tabulet, walla téléfone — ak anam gu àlluwaay bu ñu def ngir mu am solo ci seeni mbir yu mag.
16 téem yu ñu defal ci sañ-sañ — ci wàllu weex bu set ba ci guddi guddi, solarized retro, xonq bu tàng, ak lépp ci diggante.
làkk yu jëkkale interface 52 — di defar tracker music mu am solo ngir jàngalekat yi ci àdduna bi.
Seeru mbootaay, fànn gu ñu amul ci diggante ay mbir (Bassoon, Major Tracker, Chiptune3, Yépp ñu ngi ko def), fànn gu ñu amul ci diggante ay xaaj, ak fànn gu ñu amul ci diggante ay mbir.
Sistemu akkaawu ak mbir yu nekk ak jaar-jaar gi — defaral sa bibliotek ci seeni jëmmal yi.
